message:
feat(signal): complete Windows cross-platform support for ctrl_c and signal module

Widen ctrl_c.rs cfg guards from #[cfg(unix)] to #[cfg(any(unix, windows))]
so that ctrl_c() and is_available() work on Windows. Update
documentation in ctrl_c.rs and signal/mod.rs to describe Windows signal
support (SIGINT, SIGTERM, SIGBREAK) rather than Unix-only framing.

intrusive_wheel.rs: Refine the TimerNode Drop guard (softening the
linked-check) to handle edge cases where nodes may be legitimately
unlinked during drop cascades.

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
